Solo physics time trial

Flashmania

Chase milliseconds across asphalt, dirt, ice, grass, plastic, boosters, engine-off coasts, fragile sections, and airborne jumps.

Time00.000
Best--
Medal--
Speed0 km/h
Surfaceasphalt
Checkpoint0/5

Controls

Arrow keys or WASD steer and drive. Brake in mid-air to nose-dive. Space resets to the last checkpoint. R restarts. G toggles the best ghost.

Objective

Run the point-to-point course as fast as possible. Medal targets: bronze 65s, silver 54s, gold 45s, author 39s.

Status

Press any driving key to start audio and begin.
